title: Apple's WWDC: Tim Cook's AI legacy at stake in his final developer conference as CEO
summary_full: Apple heads into WWDC with Tim Cook’s AI legacy, Siri’s future as an agentic platform, and the stock’s rich valuation all on the line.
summary_public: Apple heads into WWDC with Tim Cook’s AI legacy, Siri’s future as an agentic platform, and the stock’s rich valuation all on the line.
